chapter_title.en: Chapter on the Reward of Visiting the Prophet {saws} and the Imams {a.s}, Peace Be Upon Them All

text: سَمِعْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ جَعْفَرَ بْنَ مُحَمَّدٍ وَ أَبَا اَلْحَسَنِ مُوسَى بْنَ جَعْفَرٍ وَ أَبَا اَلْحَسَنِ عَلِيَّ بْنَ مُوسَى عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ وَ هُمْ يَقُولُونَ : «مَنْ أَتَى قَبْرَ اَلْحُسَيْنِ بْنِ عَلِيٍّ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ بِعَرَفَةَ قَلَبَهُ اَللَّهُ تَعَالَى ثَلِجَ اَلصَّدْرِ ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.3170 - It is narrated from Dawud al-Raqqi, who said:
I heard Abu Abdullah (Ja‘far ibn Muhammad), Abu al-Hasan (Imam Musa ibn Jafar Al-Kadhim), and Abu al-Hasan (Imam Ali ibn Musa Ar-Ridha (as)) all saying:
"Whoever visits the grave of Imam Hussain ibn Ali (as) on the Day of Arafah, Allah (swt), the Exalted, will turn their heart into one of contentment and tranquility."
